subject: physics
title: 22M.1.HL.TZ1.35
question_html:
A direct current I in a lamp dissipates power P. What root mean square (rms) value of an alternating current dissipates average power P through the same lamp?

A.  I2

B.  I2

C.  I

D.  I2
examiners_html: This question was very challenging for HL candidates, with the lowest difficulty index on the paper. Option B was a very effective distractor; perhaps candidates were selecting their answer based on a connection between rms values and 2-1.
